title: Fit test - 2nd screen "X" button
scenario: Verify that the "X" button on the second screen of the Fit Test closes the Fit Test and returns the user to Device Settings.
steps: Open the Fit Test on the device.
Navigate to the second screen of the Fit Test.
Tap the 'X' button on the second screen.
expected: The Fit Test screen closes and the user is returned to Device Settings.
